title: Meta Tag Generator
shortDescription: Generate HTML meta tags for title, description, canonical and Open Graph fields.
metaTitle: Meta Tag Generator | Create SEO Meta Tags Instantly
metaDescription: Create title, description, canonical and Open Graph meta tags in seconds with a simple online meta tag generator.
intro: Generate clean SEO meta tags for webpages, blog posts and landing pages. Build title, description, canonical and Open Graph tags quickly and copy a ready-to-use HTML snippet.
overview: This meta tag generator helps you create search-friendly HTML metadata without manual coding. Enter your page details, preview the output, and copy optimized tags for SEO, social sharing and browser snippets.
howItWorks: Enter your page title and other metadata.
Generate a complete HTML meta tag snippet.
Review the output for SEO and social previews.
Copy the code and paste it into your page head.
useCases: SEO meta tags for landing pages
Open Graph tags for social sharing
Quick metadata setup for blog articles

faq.question: What does a meta tag generator do?
faq.answer: It creates HTML metadata such as title, description, canonical and Open Graph tags for web pages.

faq.question: Are the generated tags SEO-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes. The tool is designed for practical SEO use and social sharing previews.

faq.question: Can I copy the code directly?
faq.answer: Yes. Generate the snippet and copy it into your page head section.

faq.question: Do I need coding knowledge?
faq.answer: No. You can generate meta tags without writing HTML manually.
